testimonials.text: Thanks to this project, our village finally has reliable access to drinking water. It has changed our daily lives remarkably.
testimonials.author: Ahmed B., Zagora

testimonials.text: The academic support given to the children is truly inspiring. Their progress and motivation are visible every day.
testimonials.author: Fatima Z., Ouarzazate

testimonials.text: An exemplary initiative that meets real needs in the field. The association's commitment is admirable.
testimonials.author: Youssef M., Errachidia

testimonials.text: The actions taken have a concrete impact on the lives of families. It is serious and deeply human work.
testimonials.author: Khadija L., Tinghir

events.description: A vibrant celebration of Berber heritage, music and traditions in the heart of the High Atlas.
Tree planting, wadi cleanup and youth awareness on local climate issues.
Hands-on workshop for local farmers on irrigation and composting techniques.
Annual gala bringing together partners and donors to fund our community projects.

workProcess.title: OUR PROJECT LIFECYCLE
workProcess.step1: Listening to community needs on the ground
workProcess.step3: Ensuring project success through our team's commitment

education.title: EDUCATION
education.description: Promoting access to quality education through literacy programs, school support, and training initiatives for children and adults in rural communities.
education.label: Education & Literacy

health.title: HEALTH
health.description: Improving community health through medical caravans, awareness campaigns, and access to basic healthcare services in underserved areas.
health.label: Health & Well-being

environment.title: SUSTAINABILITY
environment.description: Protecting natural resources by organizing environmental campaigns, promoting sustainable practices, and supporting local ecological initiatives.
environment.label: Environment & Sustainability

social.title: SOLIDARITY
social.description: Strengthening social cohesion by supporting vulnerable groups, organizing solidarity actions, and fostering community engagement and inclusion.
social.label: Social Development & Solidarity

about.title: A Legacy of Solidarity
about.description: Since 2010, Tifaouine Association has been dedicated to uplifting rural communities in the High Atlas region. Through grassroots initiatives in education, health, and sustainable development, we strive to create lasting positive change.
about.commitmentDesc: Working hand in hand with locals to build resilient and self-sustaining communities.

mission.title: A Commitment to Development
mission.description: At Tifaouine, we believe in the power of collective action. Our mission is to bridge the gap in rural areas by providing essential resources, education, and healthcare. We envision a future where every individual has the opportunity to thrive and contribute to their community's prosperity.
mission.subtitle: Tifaouine Assni Association is a non-profit organization dedicated to empowering people and building stronger communities.
mission.titleAccent: Our Commitment to a Better Future

values.title: Community First
values.desc: We work hand in hand with local families, youth, and volunteers to understand needs and create lasting impact.

values.title: Education for All
values.desc: We promote access to education, literacy programs, and school support to help children and youth build a brighter future.

values.title: Social Solidarity
values.desc: We support vulnerable groups through humanitarian actions and initiatives that strengthen dignity and inclusion.

values.title: Sustainable Development
values.desc: We implement environmental and community projects that protect our region and promote a sustainable future.

values.title: Partnership & Collaboration
values.desc: We believe in the power of teamwork. We collaborate with partners and donors to maximize our positive impact.

values.title: Transparency & Commitment
values.desc: We are committed to transparency, honesty, and responsible action in everything we do for our community.
